infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ReMind needs microphone access for voice interaction
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ReMind needs speech recognition for voice input
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ReMind uses your location to show where you are and keep you safe.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ReMind monitors your location in the background so caregivers are notified if you wander outside a safe zone.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ReMind to track your location for safety monitoring.
